data.body:
[Hyakkiyako Wallpapers(Fall Edition)]

Sensei! We've prepared a special Hyakkiyako playlist and wallpapers to perfectly capture September's atmosphere.
Immerse yourself in the enchanting, romantic fall views of Hyakkiyako!

▶Playlist: https://youtube.com/watch?v=glu9FUKNOmU

#BlueArchive
